tasks.title: Fix schema validation errors across 8 key pages

statusHistory.note: Created from monthly SEO report analysis

Schema validation fixes applied across 8 key pages. Added missing 'provider' fields to 18 nested Service entries on index.html, residential-roof-repairs.html, and roof-replacement-installation.html. Added 'name' to root Service block + inlined name+address on SpecialAnnouncement on index.html. All 8 target pages now pass required-field validation.

tasks.summary: Foundational fix that supports both CTR improvements (rich snippets) and AI visibility (cleaner data signals for AI agents).

tasks.title: Fix thin content and low text-to-HTML ratio on 6 pages

statusHistory.note: Created from monthly SEO report analysis

Expanded budget-roof-cost.html from 204 words to ~983 words: 7-factor cost breakdown grid, regional pricing context for PA, 5-question FAQ section, FAQPage schema mirroring the visible FAQ, internal links to financing options and hail damage steps blog. Updated title/meta to differentiate from instant-roof-quote page.

tasks.summary: Thin pages can't rank for the queries they target. Expanding gives the existing forms/calculators the editorial context they need.

tasks.title: Spring storm roof inspection checklist for Eastern PA

statusHistory.note: Created from monthly SEO report analysis

Substantively covered by existing blog content: blog/spring-storm-roof-damage-pennsylvania.html (1360 lines, comprehensive coverage of wind/hail/debris damage + insurance claim guidance + scam avoidance) and the new blog/post-storm-roof-inspection-guide-lehigh-valley.html (publishes 5/24, DIY ground-level inspection guide). Creating a third blog on the same topic would dilute SEO rather than help.

tasks.summary: Captures leads from homeowners in the immediate post-storm buying window — the highest-intent moment in the roofing year.

tasks.title: Restructure roof repairs vs replacement page for featured snippets

statusHistory.note: Created from monthly SEO report analysis

Restructured blog/roof-repair-or-replace-guide.html: replaced 5 single-word H2s with 8 question-style H2s opening with 40-80 word direct answers, added decision-matrix table mapping situations to patch/repair/replace recommendation, rewrote FAQPage schema with 8 questions mirroring H2s for featured snippet eligibility.

tasks.summary: Featured snippet wins drive a step-change in click volume from existing rankings.

tasks.title: Create topic cluster linking strategy for roofing services

statusHistory.note: Created from monthly SEO report analysis

Added 'From Our Blog' resource sections to 4 hub pages (roof-replacement-installation, residential-roof-repairs, siding-installation, commercial-roofing) creating hub-down topic-cluster linking with descriptive blurbs and CTAs. Gutter hub being redesigned in separate session; will mirror pattern when complete.

tasks.summary: Topic clusters compound over time — the strongest sites in any niche use this pattern. Builds long-term topical authority.

tasks.title: Publish AEO-focused blog cluster: 5 new posts + 2 refreshed (Quick Answer + FAQ schema)

statusHistory.note: Created from May report AI-visibility gap analysis: high-intent roofing topics where the site was absent from AI answers and weak in search.

Published 5 new AEO-optimized blog posts and refreshed 2 existing ones. New posts: gutter repair vs replacement guide, storm and hail roof damage first steps, signs an aging roof is failing, how to choose a roofing contractor in the Lehigh Valley, and commercial roof maintenance for property managers. Refreshed in place (original URLs, slugs, hero images, and datePublished preserved): roof repair or replacement decision guide (new 5-factor decision matrix) and roof ventilation guide (re-centered on the IRC 1/150 rule, removed keyword stuffing). Every post ships a Quick Answer callout near the top for AI extraction, three JSON-LD schemas (BlogPosting, BreadcrumbList, FAQPage with 4 Q&As each), internal links to relevant service pages, a credentials block (PA HIC #PA171380, BBB A+, Owens Corning Platinum), a 6-item related-reading list, a cited Sources block, and geo meta tags. Site integration: blog-data.js and our-blog.html updated with all 7 entries, homepage featured section and More Expert Insights auto-populated, cache versions bumped across 43 HTML files. All 22 JSON-LD blocks validate, all 36 related-reading links resolve, all new image URLs return 200. Deployed to valleypeakroof.com (commits 8dd42a1, d14beb9).

targets.label: New: storm and hail roof damage
New: how to choose a contractor
Refreshed: roof repair vs replacement decision guide

tasks.summary: Directly targets the ChatGPT and AI-answer visibility gap: Quick Answer callouts plus FAQPage schema are exactly what AI assistants extract and cite. Five new high-intent topics plus two refreshed posts widen the answerable surface area and build topical authority across the repair, replacement, storm, and commercial clusters.

statusHistory.note: Created from the June report month-ahead plan plus Manus July recommendations (Deliverable A/B).

Executed the approved Manus Deliverable A plus blog plan across ~230 files and 12 deploys. Sitewide: stripped ~1,120 dollar figures from 101 files (site is now fully price-free), standardized review count (132 in schema, 130+ in copy), corrected certifications to GAF Certified and Owens Corning Preferred, removed slate/copper/green-roof/solar/historic-restoration claims, removed 24/7 emergency claims (~60 replacements). Schema repaired on 13 pages plus BreadcrumbList on 7. Black-streaks .html 301-consolidated to the clean URL. Budget-roof-cost restructured for featured snippets price-free. FAQ blocks added to instant-quote, skylight, and Northampton County pages. Internal-linking pass (~12 placements). Blogs: ice dam, home-buying inspection, winter siding (now year-round guide), and repair-vs-replace fully refreshed (old duplicate 301'd); new Easton-focused post published targeting the 0-of-19 Easton AI-prompt gap. PageSpeed work from earlier in July preserved.

tasks.summary: Converts the June report's wasted-impressions diagnosis into shipped fixes: click-worthy titles on the zero-click pages, the gutter cluster consolidated behind a repair-first page, schema and entity signals cleaned for AI grounding, and five data-picked blog pieces refreshed or published.

tasks.title: Ice dam blog post: rewrite title/meta to capture clicks from position 10.1

statusHistory.note: Created from monthly SEO report analysis

Full content refresh: new 51-char title 'Ice Dams on Your Roof: Warning Signs and What to Do', evergreen reframe (summer as prep season), all dollar figures stripped, 5-question FAQ with schema, stale HowTo schema removed.

tasks.title: Gutter page: fix title truncation, rewrite meta to compete for 28,641 impressions

statusHistory.note: Created from monthly SEO report analysis

Retitled 'Gutter Repair & Installation in the Lehigh Valley' (49 chars, was 76 and truncating), H1 rewritten, gutter replacement added to a repair H2, four repair FAQs with FAQPage schema, pricing stripped, free roof inspection made the primary CTA. Dedicated repair page deliberately rejected: one consolidated page.

tasks.title: Budget roof cost page: restructure content to win featured snippets

statusHistory.note: Created from monthly SEO report analysis

New 55-char title, 48-word direct-answer paragraph under the H1, seven cost factors restructured as a scannable 3-column table, FAQPage schema on the existing FAQ, every dollar figure removed (site is now fully price-free).

tasks.title: Build an internal linking network connecting service pages, location pages, blog posts

statusHistory.note: Created from monthly SEO report analysis

Twelve-placement pass: Easton page and storm/hail post cross-linked both directions, hail-damage-steps and Allentown storm posts link the June storm/hail post, ice dam post links gutter and financing pages, skylight page now linked from relevant blog posts, new Easton blog post wired into the Easton cluster. Neutral anchor text throughout.

tasks.title: Winter siding blog post: remove stale seasonal references, reframe for year-round value

statusHistory.note: Created from monthly SEO report analysis

Full refresh: new 54-char title 'When to Install Siding in the Lehigh Valley, by Season', restructured as a four-season timing guide with a season-by-season table (VSI and James Hardie manual citations), winter content kept as one section, pricing-discount claims removed, FAQ block added.
